footer_variants.default: You are receiving this because your account matched our B2B GTM research criteria or replied to outreach.
footer_variants.followup: You are receiving this because your team showed relevant GTM, sales, product, or marketing signals.
footer_variants.reply: You are receiving this because you replied to a GTM AI Workflow email or contacted the team directly.

benefit_bullets: Shows where account research, outreach, responses, and product-marketing feedback currently break down.
Produces a practical next-step map for turning market signal into better positioning.
offers.name: GTM signal-loop assessment
offers.story_prompt_example: Map one outreach cycle from target selection through response summary and product insight.

benefit_bullets: Ranks target accounts, identifies likely pain, and drafts a sales email with traceable rationale.
Keeps test-mode sends isolated while still updating local CRM CSV records.
offers.name: AI account research and outreach pilot
offers.story_prompt_example: Run a pilot on a small target-account list and compare pain hypotheses against actual replies.

benefit_bullets: Writes outreach status, response summaries, and next actions to a local CSV CRM.
Feeds repeated pain signals back to product and marketing as structured insight rows.
offers.name: Local CRM learning loop
offers.story_prompt_example: Review CRM and insight CSVs after each outreach cycle to refine ICP, pain language, and product claims.

founders.job_to_be_done: Find a repeatable GTM motion before scaling headcount or tooling.
founders.label: Founder or executive operator
founders.objection_to_address: Can this create a real learning loop instead of generic AI copy?
founders.pain_point: The team needs learning velocity from every outreach cycle, not just more generated emails.

product_marketing.job_to_be_done: Turn frontline GTM signals into sharper positioning and campaign insight.
product_marketing.label: Product marketing leader
product_marketing.objection_to_address: Will the feedback loop produce evidence, not just anecdotes?
product_marketing.pain_point: Sales conversations contain positioning clues, but they rarely become structured product or marketing feedback.

revenue_leaders.job_to_be_done: Create more qualified pipeline without asking reps to manually research every account.
revenue_leaders.label: Revenue leader
revenue_leaders.objection_to_address: Will this improve account quality without creating another automation queue to babysit?
revenue_leaders.pain_point: Outbound quality is uneven because account research, pain hypotheses, and follow-up notes live in too many places.

sales_ops.job_to_be_done: Keep CRM data, outreach state, and next actions current without manual admin drag.
sales_ops.label: Sales operations or RevOps
sales_ops.objection_to_address: Can the workflow remain auditable and deterministic enough for operating teams?
sales_ops.pain_point: CRM hygiene breaks when outreach, replies, and market insights are captured outside the system of record.
